title: Ready Player Fun
description: Add the ability to "pause" the server while no players are logged in. Supports time, weather and season. (server-side only)
body:
## Overview

**In versions after 1.21.2, the mod will set pause-when-empty-seconds based on the config instead of server.properties. Will continue to send unpause notification when users first join.**

Ever have a server with friends and want to use time and season mods, but the time, weather and seasons continue while nobody is logged in? Well, this is just the mod for you! Ready Player Fun is a server-side mod that allows the server to retain time, weather and season settings after the last player logs out, and resumes once a player logs in again.
